git_rationale.root_cause_commit: N/A — dead code cleanup, not a bug fix

dev.qa_notes: Verify: (1) grep -rn -E 'bulk-allowed|bulk[- ]?auth|auth[- ]flag|bulk-commit-auth-flag' on all 3 hook files returns exit code 1 (zero matches). (2) grep -c 'claude-bulk-commit-sentinel' on pretool-write-guard.sh and pretool-bash-safety.sh returns >=1 each (sentinel deny preserved). (3) bash -n passes on all 3 files. (4) DO NOT run tests under tests/generated/ — historical generated tests reference old token and are explicitly out of scope per ticket non-goals.
dev.implementation_notes: Net deletion of 14 lines. All changes are comment/string updates and dead code removal — no behavioral logic changed. The sentinel protection paths remain fully intact. Codex adversarial review confirmed no hook-code blockers in the 3-file diff.

self_verification.notes: AC1 verified: grep exit code 1 (zero auth-flag matches). AC2 verified: sentinel deny counts >=1 in both files. bash -n passes all 3 files.

dev.tdd_skip_reason: Dead code removal — no behavioral logic changed, no bug to reproduce, no new feature. Pure comment/string/pattern cleanup.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex found 3 items: (1) ISSUE: worktree scope drift risk — unrelated tracked changes visible in git status; PROPOSED_FIX: stage only the 3 hook files at commit time. (2) OBSERVATION_ONLY: No hook-code blocker found in the 3-file diff; all ACs verified. (3) OBSERVATION_ONLY: Historical tests/generated/** still contain old auth-flag tokens; ticket explicitly excludes these.
codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: Finding #1 classified as out_of_scope — unrelated changes are from other concurrent tasks/sessions. The dev report files_modified lists only the 3 hook files, and the orchestrator stages only files listed in dev.files_modified. Findings #2 and #3 are observations confirming correctness; no action needed.
